caption: In a recording studio with dark gray acoustic foam walls, a man with headphones and a microphone is reacting to a video. In the first frame, a different man in a gray t-shirt looks toward a monitor. This monitor displays a clip of several people holding up white and black mugs, with text at the bottom reading "HardShell Powder Coat," "BPA Free," and "Stays Hot Small." As the scene progresses, the man with headphones, who has a tattooed arm and wears a white t-shirt, becomes the focus. He looks upward with a surprised expression. The video playing on his screen shifts to show a man in a green shirt and a woman in a gray jacket sitting outdoors; they are interacting with a small black electronic device. The man's wide-eyed expression persists as he watches the clip, with the microphone positioned closely in front of him.
